name: Dummy Dungeon
short_description: Fight your way through randomly generated dungeons in this hardcore rouge-lite game. Discover your favorite character from a group of unique heroes and get powerful weapons or power-ups to save beautiful princesses in need.
detailed_description:
Dummy Dungeon, despite its colorful visuals, offers fast-paced gameplay from a first-person view that requires the player's mechanical skills and concentration, and in addition, gives the player a great deal of freedom to create his unique playstyle as the player makes it through the dungeons.

Various locations

Explore different corners of the world; from dark dungeons to huge flying machines, all filled with unique enemies and tons of items to collect.

Unique characters

Choose from 24 playable characters. Use a grappling hook as a Monk or produce powerful enhancements in a cauldron as a Witch. The effects offered by a character drastically affect dungeon combat.

Powerful perks and upgrades

Modify your stats and weapons as you go, customize your equipment according to your own vision to save the beautiful princess.

Each perk can be upgraded with additional copies.

Large arsenal of unique weapons

A huge number of weapons with unique enhancements. Weapon effects vary greatly from a simple critical hit or fire enhancement to effects that completely change the effect of the weapon such as knockup, creating zones, flying behind the player, gaining gold, etc.

Challenging fights and interesting bosses

Each floor ends with a battle against a powerful opponent with multiple attacks and abilities, making the fights very dynamic.
